seoTitle: Theodore vs Theresa Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Theodore and Theresa Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Theodore vs Theresa Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Theodore and Theresa Creek.
heading: Theodore vs Theresa Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Theodore, Queensland and Theresa Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Theodore has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Theresa Creek (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Theodore or Theresa Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Theodore has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Theresa Creek scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Theodore scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Theresa Creek scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Theodore or Theresa Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Theodore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
